Value Objects

FieldParameters

Field-measured water parameters

Storage

inline
Table 5. Fields
Name Type Description

temperature_c

Decimal

ph

Decimal

conductivity_us_cm

Decimal

dissolved_oxygen_mg_l

Decimal

redox_mv

Decimal

turbidity_ntu

Decimal

color_pcu

Decimal
Invariants

  • ph_valid: ph IS NULL OR ( ph >= 0 AND ph ⇐ 14 )

SaturationIndex

Storage

inline
Table 10. Fields
Name Type Description

mineral_name

String

*

si_value

Decimal

*

saturation_state

String

*

log_iap

Decimal

log_ksp

Decimal
Invariants

  • state_valid: saturation_state IN ( 'undersaturated' , 'saturated' , 'supersaturated' )

WaterType

Storage

inline
Table 11. Fields
Name Type Description

piper_classification

String

dominant_cation

String

dominant_anion

String

tds_mg_l

Decimal

hardness_mg_l_caco3

Decimal

alkalinity_mg_l_caco3

Decimal
IonBalance

Cation-anion balance check

Storage

inline
Table 12. Fields
Name Type Description

sum_cations_meq_l

Decimal

*

sum_anions_meq_l

Decimal

*

balance_error_percent

Decimal

*

acceptable

Boolean

*
Invariants

  • balance_calc: balance_error_percent = ABS ( sum_cations_meq_l - sum_anions_meq_l ) / ( sum_cations_meq_l + sum_anions_meq_l ) * 200

Value Objects

IonicRadius

Ionic radius varies with oxidation state, coordination number, and spin state (for transition metals)

Also known as: Shannon radius, crystal radius

Storage

inline
Table 37. Fields
Name Type Description

oxidation_state

Integer

*

coordination

Integer

*

radius_angstrom

Decimal

*

spin_state

String
Invariants

  • radius_positive: radius_angstrom > 0

OxidationState

Possible oxidation state for an element with commonality indicator

Storage

inline
Table 38. Fields
Name Type Description

state

Integer

*

is_common

Boolean

*

example_compound

String
ElectronShell

Electron configuration component

Storage

inline
Table 39. Fields
Name Type Description

shell_number

Integer

*

subshell

String

*

electrons

Integer

*
Invariants

  • shell_valid: shell_number >= 1 AND shell_number ⇐ 7

  • subshell_valid: subshell IN ( 's' , 'p' , 'd' , 'f' )

Value Objects

UnitCell

Unit cell parameters defining the crystal lattice dimensions and angles

Also known as: lattice parameters, cell constants

Storage

inline
Table 48. Fields
Name Type Description

a_angstrom

Decimal

*

b_angstrom

Decimal

*

c_angstrom

Decimal

*

alpha_degrees

Decimal

*

beta_degrees

Decimal

*

gamma_degrees

Decimal

*

volume_angstrom3

Decimal

*

z_formula_units

Integer

*
Invariants

  • angles_valid: alpha_degrees > 0 AND alpha_degrees < 180 AND beta_degrees > 0 AND beta_degrees < 180 AND gamma_degrees > 0 AND gamma_degrees < 180

  • lengths_positive: a_angstrom > 0 AND b_angstrom > 0 AND c_angstrom > 0

MillerIndices

Miller indices (hkl) or Miller-Bravais indices (hkil) for hexagonal systems

Also known as: crystal face indices, lattice plane indices

Storage

inline
Table 49. Fields
Name Type Description

h

Integer

*

k

Integer

*

l

Integer

*

i

Integer

d_spacing_angstrom

Decimal

multiplicity

Integer
SymmetryElement

Crystallographic symmetry operation element

Storage

inline
Table 50. Fields
Name Type Description

element_type

String

*

symmetry_order

Integer

orientation

String

hermann_mauguin

String

*

schoenflies

String
Invariants

  • type_valid: element_type IN ( 'identity' , 'rotation' , 'mirror' , 'inversion' , 'rotoinversion' , 'screw' , 'glide' )

WyckoffPosition

Wyckoff position defining equivalent atomic positions in a space group

Storage

inline
Table 51. Fields
Name Type Description

letter

String

*

multiplicity

Integer

*

site_symmetry

String

*

coordinates

String

*

a1_x

*

a1_y

*

a2_z

Decimal

*

*

a3_z

Decimal

*

Specifications

Table 53. Specifications
Name For Entity Description

CentrosymmetricSpaceGroup

SpaceGroup

Space groups containing an inversion center

ChiralSpaceGroup

SpaceGroup

Space groups allowing only one handedness (enantiomorphic pairs)

PolarSpaceGroup

SpaceGroup

Space groups with a unique polar axis

SymmorphicSpaceGroup

SpaceGroup

Space groups without screw axes or glide planes

CommonMineralSpaceGroup

SpaceGroup

Space groups most commonly found in rock-forming minerals

inline

Name Type Description

*

grid_system

String

Invariants

  • dip_valid: dip >= -90 AND dip ⇐ 90

DownholeSurvey

Downhole directional survey point

Storage

inline
Table 60. Fields
Name Type Description

depth_m

Decimal

*

azimuth

Decimal

*

dip

Decimal

*

survey_method

String

magnetic_declination

Decimal

survey_date

Date
Invariants

  • azimuth_valid: azimuth >= 0 AND azimuth < 360

  • dip_valid: dip >= -90 AND dip ⇐ 90

CoreRecovery

Core recovery statistics

Storage

inline
Table 61. Fields
Name Type Description

interval_top_m

Decimal

*

interval_bottom_m

Decimal

*

drilled_length_m

Decimal

*

core_recovered_m

Decimal

*

recovery_percent

Decimal

*

rqd_percent

Decimal

core_condition

String
Invariants

  • interval_order: interval_top_m < interval_bottom_m

  • recovery_calc: recovery_percent = ( core_recovered_m / drilled_length_m ) * 100

  • rqd_valid: rqd_percent IS NULL OR ( rqd_percent >= 0 AND rqd_percent ⇐ 100 )

LithologyInterval

Lithology logging interval

Storage

inline

Name Type Description

interval_top_m

mineralization

String

alteration

String

veining

String

description

String
Invariants

log_type

String
Invariants

  • genetic_valid: genetic_type IN ( 'magmatic' , 'hydrothermal' , 'sedimentary' , 'supergene' , 'metamorphic' , 'placer' , 'volcanic' , 'mvt' , 'vms' , 'orogenic' , 'iocg' , 'porphyry' , 'epithermal' , 'carlin' , 'bif' ) OR genetic_type IS NULL

Invariants

  • depth_order: top_m ⇐ base_m

  • thickness_calc: thickness_m = base_m - top_m

RGBColor

Storage

inline
Table 154. Fields
Name Type Description

red

Integer

*

green

Integer

*

blue

Integer

*

alpha

Integer

*
Invariants

  • rgb_valid: red >= 0 AND red ⇐ 255 AND green >= 0 AND green ⇐ 255 AND blue >= 0 AND blue ⇐ 255

  • alpha_valid: alpha >= 0 AND alpha ⇐ 255

CMYKColor

Storage

inline
Table 155. Fields
Name Type Description

cyan

Decimal

*

magenta

Decimal

*

yellow

Decimal

*

black

Decimal

*
Invariants

  • cmyk_valid: cyan >= 0 AND cyan ⇐ 100 AND magenta >= 0 AND magenta ⇐ 100 AND yellow >= 0 AND yellow ⇐ 100 AND black >= 0 AND black ⇐ 100

inline

Value Objects

Coordinates

Geographic coordinates with datum and precision information

Also known as: GPS coordinates, location, position

Storage

inline
Table 207. Fields
Name Type Description

latitude_dd

Decimal

*

longitude_dd

Decimal

*

altitude_m

Decimal

coordinate_system

String

*

datum

String

*

precision_m

Decimal

acquisition_method

String

acquisition_datetime

Timestamp
Invariants

  • lat_valid: latitude_dd >= -90 AND latitude_dd ⇐ 90

  • lon_valid: longitude_dd >= -180 AND longitude_dd ⇐ 180

UTMCoordinates

Universal Transverse Mercator projection coordinates

Also known as: UTM, grid reference

Storage

inline
Table 208. Fields
Name Type Description

zone

Integer

*

hemisphere

String

*

easting_m

Decimal

*

northing_m

Decimal

*

altitude_m

Decimal

datum

String

*
Invariants

  • zone_valid: zone >= 1 AND zone ⇐ 60

  • hemisphere_valid: hemisphere IN ( 'N' , 'S' )

  • easting_valid: easting_m >= 100000 AND easting_m ⇐ 900000

BoundingBox

Geographic bounding box for area features

Storage

inline
Table 209. Fields
Name Type Description

min_latitude

Decimal

*

max_latitude

Decimal

*

min_longitude

Decimal

*

max_longitude

Decimal

*
Invariants

  • bounds_valid: min_latitude ⇐ max_latitude AND min_longitude ⇐ max_longitude

TopographicSetting

Topographic and physiographic setting of a location

Storage

inline
Table 210. Fields
Name Type Description

elevation_m

Decimal

*

slope_degrees

Decimal

aspect_azimuth

Decimal

local_relief_m

Decimal

landform_type

String

drainage_pattern

String

vegetation_cover

String
Invariants

  • elevation_valid: elevation_m >= -11000 AND elevation_m ⇐ 9000

  • slope_valid: slope_degrees >= 0 AND slope_degrees ⇐ 90

  • aspect_valid: aspect_azimuth >= 0 AND aspect_azimuth < 360

MapProjection

inline

Value Objects

RMRParameters

Rock Mass Rating (Bieniawski 1989) parameters

Storage

inline
Table 221. Fields
Name Type Description

ucs_rating

Integer

*

rqd_rating

Integer

*

spacing_rating

Integer

*

condition_rating

Integer

*

groundwater_rating

Integer

*

orientation_adjustment

Integer

rmr_basic

Integer

*

rmr_adjusted

Integer
Invariants

  • ucs_valid: ucs_rating >= 0 AND ucs_rating ⇐ 15

  • rqd_valid: rqd_rating >= 0 AND rqd_rating ⇐ 20

  • spacing_valid: spacing_rating >= 0 AND spacing_rating ⇐ 20

  • condition_valid: condition_rating >= 0 AND condition_rating ⇐ 30

  • gw_valid: groundwater_rating >= 0 AND groundwater_rating ⇐ 15

QSystemParameters

Q-system (Barton et al. 1974) parameters

Storage

inline
Table 222. Fields
Name Type Description

rqd

Decimal

*

jn

Decimal

*

jr

Decimal

*

ja

Decimal

*

jw

Decimal

*

srf

Decimal

*

q_value

Decimal

*

q_prime

Decimal

qc

Decimal
Invariants

  • q_calc: q_value = ( rqd / jn ) * ( jr / ja ) * ( jw / srf )

GSIEstimate

Geological Strength Index estimate

Storage

inline
Table 223. Fields
Name Type Description

gsi_value

Integer

*

structure

String

*

surface_condition

String

*

confidence

String

notes

String
Invariants

  • gsi_valid: gsi_value >= 5 AND gsi_value ⇐ 100

  • structure_valid: structure IN ( 'intact' , 'blocky' , 'very_blocky' , 'blocky_disturbed' , 'disintegrated' , 'laminated' )

  • condition_valid: surface_condition IN ( 'very_good' , 'good' , 'fair' , 'poor' , 'very_poor' )

DiscontinuitySet

Discontinuity set characterization

Storage

inline
Table 224. Fields
Name Type Description

set_id

String

🔑*

set_type

String

*

dip

Decimal

*

dip_direction

Decimal

*

spacing_m

Decimal

persistence_m

Decimal

roughness

String

aperture_mm

Decimal

infilling

String

weathering

String

water_condition

String

jrc

Decimal

jcs_mpa

Decimal
Invariants

  • type_valid: set_type IN ( 'joint' , 'bedding' , 'foliation' , 'fault' , 'shear' , 'fracture' , 'cleavage' )

  • dip_valid: dip >= 0 AND dip ⇐ 90

  • dip_dir_valid: dip_direction >= 0 AND dip_direction < 360

RockStrength

Intact rock strength properties

Storage

inline
Table 225. Fields
Name Type Description

ucs_mpa

Decimal

ucs_classification

String

Decimal

brazilian_tensile_mpa

Decimal

cohesion_mpa

Decimal

friction_angle_deg

Decimal

youngs_modulus_gpa

Decimal

poissons_ratio

Decimal

hoek_brown_mi

Decimal

test_method

String
Invariants

  • ucs_class_valid: ucs_classification IN ( 'extremely_weak' , 'very_weak' , 'weak' , 'medium' , 'strong' , 'very_strong' , 'extremely_strong' ) OR ucs_classification IS NULL

Value Objects

IsotropicOptics

Optical properties for isotropic minerals (cubic system + amorphous)

Also known as: isotropic optical properties

Storage

inline
Table 268. Fields
Name Type Description

refractive_index

Decimal

*

color_ppl

String

relief

String

*

color_reflected

String

internal_reflections

String

is_opaque

Boolean

*
Invariants

  • ri_valid: refractive_index > 1.0 AND refractive_index < 3.5

  • relief_valid: relief IN ( 'very_low' , 'low' , 'moderate' , 'high' , 'very_high' , 'extreme' )

UniaxialOptics

Optical properties for uniaxial minerals (tetragonal, hexagonal, trigonal)

Also known as: uniaxial optical properties

Storage

inline
Table 269. Fields
Name Type Description

omega

Decimal

*

epsilon

Decimal

*

optic_sign

String

*

birefringence

Decimal

*

max_interference_color

String

relief

String

*

color_ppl

String

pleochroism_strength

String

pleochroism_o

String

pleochroism_e

String

extinction_type

String

*

extinction_angle

Decimal

elongation_sign

String

interference_figure

String

twinning

String
Invariants

  • sign_valid: optic_sign IN ( '+' , '-' )

  • extinction_valid: extinction_type IN ( 'straight' , 'symmetrical' , 'inclined' , 'undulose' )

BiaxialOptics

Optical properties for biaxial minerals (orthorhombic, monoclinic, triclinic)

Also known as: biaxial optical properties

Storage

inline
Table 270. Fields
Name Type Description

alpha

Decimal

*

beta

Decimal

*

gamma

Decimal

*

optic_sign

String

*

two_v_angle

Decimal

*

birefringence

Decimal

*

max_interference_color

String

relief

String

*

color_ppl

String

pleochroism_strength

String

pleochroism_x

String

pleochroism_y

String

pleochroism_z

String

pleochroism_formula

String

extinction_type

String

*

extinction_angle_max

Decimal

optic_plane

String

dispersion

String

twinning

String

cleavage_trace_angle

Decimal
Invariants

  • sign_valid: optic_sign IN ( '+' , '-' )

  • two_v_valid: two_v_angle >= 0 AND two_v_angle ⇐ 90

  • ri_order: alpha ⇐ beta AND beta ⇐ gamma

Hardness

Mohs and Vickers hardness with anisotropy notes

Storage

inline
Table 271. Fields
Name Type Description

mohs_min

Decimal

*

mohs_max

Decimal

*

vickers_hardness

Decimal

hardness_anisotropy

String
Invariants

  • mohs_valid: mohs_min >= 1 AND mohs_max ⇐ 10 AND mohs_min ⇐ mohs_max

Density

Mineral density/specific gravity

Also known as: specific gravity, SG

Storage

inline
Table 272. Fields
Name Type Description

measured_g_cm3

Decimal

calculated_g_cm3

Decimal

range_min

Decimal

*

range_max

Decimal

*
Invariants

  • density_valid: range_min > 0 AND range_max > 0 AND range_min ⇐ range_max

inline
Table 273. Fields
Name Type Description

cleavage_1_form

String

cleavage_1_quality

String

cleavage_1_miller

String

cleavage_2_form

String

cleavage_2_quality

String

cleavage_2_miller

String

cleavage_3_form

String

cleavage_3_quality

String

String

cleavage_angle_1_2

Decimal

cleavage_angle_1_3

Decimal

parting

String
Invariants

Fracture

Storage

inline
Table 274. Fields
Name Type Description

fracture_type

String

*

tenacity

String

*
Invariants

  • fracture_valid: fracture_type IN ( 'conchoidal' , 'subconchoidal' , 'uneven' , 'hackly' , 'splintery' , 'earthy' , 'fibrous' )

  • tenacity_valid: tenacity IN ( 'brittle' , 'sectile' , 'malleable' , 'ductile' , 'flexible' , 'elastic' )

inline
Table 275. Fields
Name Type Description

luster_type

String

*

luster_quality

String

streak_color

String

streak_hardness

String
Invariants

String

Boolean

Value Objects

SoilColor

Munsell soil color notation

Storage

inline
Table 323. Fields
Name Type Description

hue

String

*

value_num

Decimal

*

chroma

Decimal

*

munsell_code

String

*

moisture_state

String

*
Invariants

  • value_valid: value_num >= 0 AND value_num ⇐ 10

  • chroma_valid: chroma >= 0 AND chroma ⇐ 12

  • moisture_valid: moisture_state IN ( 'dry' , 'moist' , 'wet' )

inline
Table 324. Fields
Name Type Description

sand_percent

Decimal

*

silt_percent

Decimal

*

clay_percent

Decimal

*

coarse_fragments_pct

Decimal

texture_class

String
Invariants

  • sum_valid: sand_percent + silt_percent + clay_percent BETWEEN 99 AND 101

Figure 128. MetamorphicRock — Default Wireframe

MetamorphicFacies

Metamorphic facies defined by Pressure-Temperature conditions (Eskola 1915, Turner 1948). Note: This is distinct from Stratigraphy.SedimentaryFacies which represents depositional environments. Metamorphic facies are defined by stable mineral assemblages at specific P-T conditions: zeolite, prehnite-pumpellyite, greenschist, blueschist, amphibolite, granulite, eclogite, hornfels, sanidinite.

Table 344. Fields
Name Type Description

id

UUID

🔑*

code

String

*①

name

String

*

temperature_min_c

Decimal

*

temperature_max_c

Decimal

*

pressure_min_kbar

Decimal

*

pressure_max_kbar

Decimal

*

geothermal_gradient

String

diagnostic_assemblages

String

typical_minerals

String

tectonic_setting

String

description

String
Figure 129. MetamorphicFacies — Default Wireframe

  • facies_valid: facies IN ( 'zeolite' , 'prehnite_pumpellyite' , 'greenschist' , 'amphibolite' , 'granulite' , 'blueschist' , 'eclogite' , 'hornfels' , 'sanidinite' )

Figure 150. LithostratigraphicUnit — Default Wireframe

SedimentaryFacies

Sedimentary facies for depositional environment interpretation. Note: This is distinct from Petrology.MetamorphicFacies which represents P-T conditions. Sedimentary facies are defined by lithology, sedimentary structures, and fossils (Walther’s Law applies). Types: lithofacies (rock character), biofacies (fossil content), ichnofacies (trace fossils), seismic_facies (reflection patterns).

Table 394. Fields
Name Type Description

id

UUID

🔑*

code

String

*①

facies_code

String

*

name

String

*

facies_type

String

*

lithology

String

*

grain_size

String

sedimentary_structures

String

fossils

String

color

String

thickness_range

String

geometry

String

depositional_process

String

depositional_environment

String

facies_associations

String

description

String
Figure 151. SedimentaryFacies — Default Wireframe

GeochronometricAge

Radiometric or other absolute age determination

Also known as: radiometric age, absolute age

Storage

inline
Table 395. Fields
Name Type Description

age_ma

Decimal

*

uncertainty_ma

Decimal

dating_method

String

*

material_dated

String

lab_reference

String
Invariants

  • age_positive: age_ma >= 0

  • method_valid: dating_method IN ( 'U-Pb' , 'Ar-Ar' , 'K-Ar' , 'Rb-Sr' , 'Sm-Nd' , 'Lu-Hf' , 'Re-Os' , 'C14' , 'fission_track' , 'cosmogenic' , 'OSL' , 'TL' )

Value Objects

Orientation

Structural orientation measurement

Storage

inline
Table 405. Fields
Name Type Description

strike

Decimal

dip

Decimal

dip_direction

Decimal

trend

Decimal

plunge

Decimal

quadrant_notation

String

measurement_convention

String
Invariants

  • strike_valid: strike IS NULL OR ( strike >= 0 AND strike < 360 )

  • dip_valid: dip IS NULL OR ( dip >= 0 AND dip ⇐ 90 )

  • convention_valid: measurement_convention IN ( 'right_hand_rule' , 'dip_direction' , 'quadrant' ) OR measurement_convention IS NULL

inline

Name Type Description

*

*

sigma2_plunge

Decimal

Decimal

regime

*
Invariants

inline
Table 407. Fields
Name Type Description

x_axis

Decimal

*

y_axis

Decimal

*

z_axis

Decimal

*

k_value

Decimal

d_value

Decimal

flinn_type

String

strain_intensity

Decimal
Invariants

  • axes_order: x_axis >= y_axis AND y_axis >= z_axis

  • flinn_valid: flinn_type IN ( 'prolate' , 'oblate' , 'plane_strain' ) OR flinn_type IS NULL

inline

Name Type Description

rake

*

dip_slip_m

Decimal

Decimal

slip_sense

String

*
Invariants

  • rake_valid: rake >= -180 AND rake ⇐ 180

  • sense_valid: slip_sense IN ( 'normal' , 'reverse' , 'dextral' , 'sinistral' , 'oblique_normal_dextral' , 'oblique_normal_sinistral' , 'oblique_reverse_dextral' , 'oblique_reverse_sinistral' )

  • trend_valid: trend >= 0 AND trend < 360
